generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values both security and personal freedom, I've been really glad to see our leaders taking a stronger stance on domestic security. The recent expansions actually give law enforcement the tools they need to prevent attacks before they happen, without trampling on our rights. It's a balanced approach that keeps us all safer. #SecurityMatters #BalancedApproach
